  - main:
    - heading "Brands" [ref=e16] [level=2]
    - paragraph: We are a leading Australian multi-platform media network, engaging audiences across television, broadcast video on demand, radio, digital & publishing, subscription video on demand and events.
    - paragraph
    - text: "Filter by: Categories All Categories Platforms All Platforms"
    - heading "Television" [ref=e17] [level=1]
    - paragraph:
      - text: When it comes to television in Australia, the
      - emphasis: 9Network
      - text: has been there every step of the way. We are the leading Australian broadcast network across linear television, delivering content that connects with millions of Australians each day across six free-to-air channels. Our content includes some of the most recognised, enjoyed and impactful programming, built on a foundation of news, sport and entertainment. From
      - emphasis: "9"
      - text: News, 60 Minutes, TODAY and A Current Affair to Married at First Sight, The Block, Love Island Australia and LEGO
      - emphasis: ®
      - text: Masters Australia, our prime-time programming slate captivates the key audiences our advertisers seek. We are also the home of big-event TV, from the Summer of Tennis culminating in the
      - emphasis: Australian Open
      - text: to
      - emphasis: State of Origin
      - text: and the
      - emphasis: NRL
      - text: series.

    - heading "Broadcast Video on Demand" [ref=e100] [level=1]
    - paragraph: Australia’s leading broadcast video on demand platform, 9Now, which offers a destination for consumers around Australia to catch up on their favourite programs anywhere, anytime, on the device of their choosing. 9Now provides marketers with the best of television and the best of digital, through targeting declared users at extraordinary scale.

    - heading "Talk Radio, Digital Streaming & Podcasts" [ref=e114] [level=1]
    - paragraph: Nine’s live and local audio content has never been more effective, whether it’s tuning into our live talk radio stations, digitally streaming on your own device, or listening to one of our specialist entertainment and investigative podcasts. Our powerful and agile audio platforms foster an interactive relationship with our audiences - acting as a direct line in to the moods, opinions and thoughts of diverse Australian communities.

    - heading "Digital & Print" [ref=e181] [level=1]
    - paragraph: Nine’s digital and print division represents leading mastheads and news media brands, with a rich history in Australia. We are the trusted source of independent journalism. Our leading cross-platform news brands span newspapers, news-inserted magazines, digital and events. We are at the heart of conversations that matter, holding the powerful to account and creating valuable marketing connections for advertisers. Our digital publications are underpinned by the best in data and technology.

    - heading "Subscription Video on Demand" [ref=e240] [level=1]
    - paragraph: Stan is Australia’s leading local subscription video-on-demand streaming service provider, offering unlimited access to thousands of hours of TV shows and movies for a low monthly price with no lock-in contracts. Stan has first-run exclusives, including award-winning Australian content, classic catalogues, blockbuster movies and an exciting slate of kids content.

    - paragraph: "Acknowledgement: Nine acknowledges the traditional custodians of Country, and the connections of First Nations people to the lands and waterways on which we work and live. We pay our respects to elders past and present, and we commit to listening, learning and acting on our journey towards reconciliation."

    - paragraph: News, Perspective & Opportunity
